debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G : Graph α β
M : Set β
hM : @Graph.IsMatching α β G M
hnotmax : ¬@Graph.IsMaxMatching α β G M
inst✝ : G.EdgeFinite
M' : Set β
hM' : @Graph.IsMatching α β G M'
hM'cd : M.encard < M'.encard
⊢ ∃ P, @Graph.IsAugPath α β M G hM P

proof:
-- This is Berge's lemma: analyze M ∆ M' which decomposes into alternating paths/cycles
  -- Since |M'| > |M|, some path component has more M'-edges than M edges
  exact hM.symmDiff_maxDegree_le_two hM' |> fun _ => sorry
successful_attempts:
-- This is Berge's lemma: analyze M ∆ M' which decomposes into alternating paths/cycles
  -- Since |M'| > |M|, some path component has more M'-edges than M edges
  exact hM.symmDiff_maxDegree_le_two hM' |> fun _ => sorry
